case_title: FIRST FEDERAL BANK OF CALIFORNIA VS. FELICIA MERCED et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST FEDERAL BANK OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT MERCED, FELICIA DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF FIRST FEDERAL BANK OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED; THE MOTION IS EITHER MOOT BECAUSE DEFENDANTS HAVE VACATED, REMOVING THE ISSUE OF POSSESSION AND CONVERTING THIS CASE TO A GENERAL CIVIL CASE, OR THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO POSSESSION. MR. KILDUFF TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-10-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
